Index

Modules: gltf, gltf/animations, gltf/backends/opengl/common, gltf/backends/opengl/renderer, gltf/backends/shaders, gltf/common, gltf/draco, gltf/draco/attributes, gltf/draco/bitstreams, gltf/draco/decoders, gltf/draco/entropy, gltf/draco/meshes, gltf/draco/types, gltf/internal, gltf/ktx2, gltf/models, gltf/pbr, gltf/reader, gltf/shaders, gltf/writer.

API symbols

`$`:
  • models: proc `$`(sampler: TextureSampler): string
`[]`:
  • models: proc `[]`(node: Node; name: string): Node

  • models: proc updateTransforms(node: Node; transform = mat4(); applyTrs = true)
uploadKtx2:
  • ktx2: proc uploadKtx2(info: Ktx2TextureInfo; data: string; sampler = defaultKtx2Sampler()): GLuint
uploadToGpu:
  • renderer: proc uploadToGpu(primitive: Primitive)
useNormalTexture:
  • shaders: var useNormalTexture
useShadow:
  • shaders: var useShadow
useSkinning:
  • shaders: var useSkinning
vertex:
  • meshes: proc vertex(table: CornerTable; corner: int): int
VertexEntryPoint:
  • renderer: const VertexEntryPoint
view:
  • shaders: var view
VkFormatBc1RgbaSrgbBlock:
  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc1RgbaSrgbBlock
VkFormatBc1RgbaUnormBlock:
  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc1RgbaUnormBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc1RgbSrgbBlock
VkFormatBc1RgbUnormBlock:
  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc1RgbUnormBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc2SrgbBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc2UnormBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc3SrgbBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc3UnormBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc4SnormBlock

  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc4UnormBlock
VkFormatBc5SnormBlock:
  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc5SnormBlock
VkFormatBc5UnormBlock:
  • ktx2: const VkFormatBc5UnormBlock
vkFormatForGlInternalFormat:
  • ktx2: proc vkFormatForGlInternalFormat(glInternalFormat: GLenum): uint32
vkFormatName:
  • ktx2: proc vkFormatName(vkFormat: uint32): string
VkFormatR32Sfloat:
  • ktx2: const VkFormatR32Sfloat
walkNodes:
  • models: proc walkNodes(node: Node): seq[Node]
writeGLB:
  • writer: proc writeGLB(root: Node; path: string; imageWriteMode = iwmEmbedded)
writeKtx2File:
  • ktx2: proc writeKtx2File(file: string; vkFormat: uint32; width, height: int; levelsData: openArray[string])
writeKtx2ImageFile:
  • ktx2: proc writeKtx2ImageFile(file: string; image: Image; vkFormat: uint32; generateMipmaps = true)
writeKtx2R32SfloatFile:
  • ktx2: proc writeKtx2R32SfloatFile(file: string; width, height: int; values: openArray[float32])
writeKtx2TextureFile:
  • ktx2: proc writeKtx2TextureFile(target: GLenum; texture: GLuint; file: string; vkFormat: uint32 = 0'u32; sourceFormat: GLenum = 0.GLenum; sourceType: GLenum = 0.GLenum; levelCount = -1)

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-06-28 14:25:12 UTC
